LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.VeeDr: let the drought's dust and rationing press on the day
a long drought drying the colony
rain has failed for too long; dust gets into everything, water is counted carefully, and the crops look brittle
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.VeeLo: let the missing dawn make time and routine feel unmoored
a long night with no dawn
the sun has not returned; lamps keep burning, sleep and work lose their old boundaries, and nobody can quite feel what hour it should be
no dawn, lamps burning, time unmoored
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.VeeSc: let the punishing heat bend the colony's routine around survival
a lasting scorch over the colony
daylight carries punishing heat; ordinary work waits for darkness where it can, and every exposed task costs more
punishing heat, work pushed into the night
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.VeeWh: let the whiteout close the world down to walls, snow, and shared nerves
walls of snow erase the world outside; paths and landmarks disappear, people stay close indoors, and cabin pressure keeps building
walls of snow, a buried world, cabin pressure
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.VeePs: let the strange flowering make the familiar landscape feel lightly unreal
a psychic bloom changing the land
unnatural flowering spreads through familiar ground while a light psychic sensation hangs over everyone's thoughts
strange flowering, heads feeling too light
keep the shared psychic pressure present beneath ordinary thought
a psychic pressure shared across the colony
something presses through many minds at once; the exact effect differs, but nobody experiencing it can treat their own thoughts as entirely private
pressure in the mind that everyone shares
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.EventWindow.VeeEarthquak: {0} felt the ground turn against the colony: {1}.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.EventWindow.VeeMeteorite: {0} watched fire fall out of the sky: {1}.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.EventWindow.VeeSpaceBatt: {0} saw a war overhead spill down toward the colony: {1}.
{0} saw animals come in numbers that felt impossible: {1}.
